filesystem.description: Local filesystem access for reading project files

github.description: GitHub integration for issues, PRs, and repository management

web-search.description: Web search for documentation and research

code-review.description: Perform code review on changed files
code-review.template:
Review the following code changes for:
1. Code quality and best practices
2. Security vulnerabilities
3. Performance issues
4. Test coverage

{{changes}}

architecture-review.template:
Analyze the following architecture decision:

{{decision}}

Consider:
1. Scalability
2. Maintainability
3. Security
4. Performance
5. Cost implications
